text: Mendoza J (2026). rqgis: R API QGIS Plugin. R package version 0.1.0, https://jsmendozap.github.io/rqgis.
code: @Manual{,   title = {rqgis: R API for QGIS Plugin},   author = {Juan Mendoza},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://jsmendozap.github.io/rqgis}, }

title: R API for QGIS Plugin
text: rqgis package provides R API R Console QGIS plugin. allows interact active QGIS project, read project properties, list layers, transfer spatial data R QGIS, use interactive map tools directly R console. Note: package designed run exclusively inside QGIS R Console plugin. relies custom communication protocol established plugin work standalone RStudio session.

title: R API for QGIS Plugin
text: Connect active QGIS project using qgis_project(). returns R6 object serves main interface.
code: qgis <- qgis_project()  # Project metadata qgis$title    # project title qgis$path     # project file path qgis$crs      # CRS identifier (e.g. "EPSG:4326") qgis$units    # map units (e.g. "meters")

previous_headings: Usage > Connect to the QGIS Project
title: R API for QGIS Plugin
text: List layers project: Process data R insert back QGIS: Perform analysis R push results back QGIS new layer. Get layer QGIS R: can load layer name ID. Vector layers loaded sf objects rasters SpatRaster objects.
code: # List all layers layers_df <- qgis$list_layers() print(layers_df)  # List only vector layers vector_layers <- qgis$list_layers(type = 0) print(vector_layers) library(sf) library(rnaturalearth) library(dplyr)  world <- ne_countries() %>% select(name, continent)  # Insert the new layer into QGIS qgis$insert_layer(world, name = "world") # Load the vector layer back into R world_new <- qgis$get_layer("world")  # Load a raster layer dem <- qgis$get_layer("dem_raster")

previous_headings: Usage > Connect to the QGIS Project
title: R API for QGIS Plugin
code: qgis$layer_info("world") # Layer: world>  # @ Type: vector  # @ CRS:  EPSG:4326  # @ Extent:  #     xmin = -180  #     xmax = 180  #     ymin = -90  #     ymax = 83.64513  # @ Geometry: MultiPolygon  # @ Features: 177  # @ Fields: #     name #     continent

title: R API for QGIS Plugin
text: Prompt user draw geometries QGIS map canvas receive coordinates instantly R: full details available methods, explore Reference section.
code: # Draw a rectangle and get its bounding box (sf bbox) my_bbox <- qgis_draw_rectangle()  # Draw a specific number of points (sf sfc) my_points <- qgis_draw_points(n = 3)

what: Interface to the QGIS Project — QgisProject
title: Interface to the QGIS Project — QgisProject
text: QgisProject class provides R6 interface interact currently active QGIS project. allows reading project properties, listing layers, transferring spatial data R QGIS.

title: Interface to the QGIS Project — QgisProject
text: Please note instantiate class manually using QgisProject$new(). Instead, use public wrapper function qgis_project() safely establish connection.

title: Interface to the QGIS Project — QgisProject
text: title (character) title QGIS project (read-). path (character) absolute path QGIS project file (read-). crs (character) authority ID project's CRS (e.g., "EPSG:4326") (read-). units (character) map units project (e.g., "meters") (read-).

title: Interface to the QGIS Project — QgisProject
text: QgisProject$new() QgisProject$list_layers() QgisProject$get_layer() QgisProject$insert_layer() QgisProject$layer_info() QgisProject$get_canvas_extent() QgisProject$get_selected_features() QgisProject$print() QgisProject$clone()

what: Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
title: Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
text: Establishes connection currently active QGIS project. function main entry point rqgis package, returning R6 object allows interact QGIS layers, extent, project metadata directly R console.

title: Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
text: data Optional list containing updates project state. Intended internal plugin use .

title: Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
text: R6 object class QgisProject containing project's metadata methods bidirectional data transfer.

title: Connect to the Active QGIS Project — qgis_project
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Connect to the active QGIS project qgis <- qgis_project()  # Inspect project properties qgis$title qgis$crs  # List available layers and retrieve one as an sf object qgis$list_layers() my_layer <- qgis$get_layer("world_borders") } # }

title: rqgis 0.4.0
text: Introduce rqgis package wrap public API QGIS interaction R. Added qgis_draw_bbox qgis_draw_points functions Automatic configuration qgis_process path qgisprocess package load Dedicated API documentation website published via pkgdown Implement log viewer settings panel Added option settings display plugin title main panel Bug fixes
